channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Litter from Macdonald’s, 21st March
item.description:
Is it possible to trace this person from the details on the litter and fine them?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oakham Drive, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several pot holes on uphill side of monkfrith way, 21st March
item.description:
Reported previously but still there
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Monkfrith Way, Brunswick Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive pothole, 21st March
item.description:
Roughly in that location
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Great Cambridge Road, Broxbourne
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite 55 and 59 Malvern road, 21st March
item.description:
Mixed fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Broken uneven pavement at 67 Vera Avenue, 21st March
item.description:
This pavement was severely damaged by contractors delivering steel beams 2? years ago and has not been fixed since. There does not seem to be any work on the site at present. The council should NOT have to pay for this repair.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Vera Avenue, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cardboard boxes filled up with rubbish near the bin blocking the walkway, pedestrians are tripping and caller is concerned of fire risk, 21st March
item.description:
Cardboard boxes filled up with rubbish near the bin blocking the walkway, pedestrians are tripping and caller is concerned of fire risk
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Naval Walk, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned rubbish, 21st March
item.description:
Bags abandoned post a skip in this location and excessive debris in the road that requires a clean up. Union Road near the alleyway between Herbert Road and Balfour Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Union Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Same car 7th time reported, 21st March
item.description:
Same resident at Pynfolds parking their car illegally - same spot

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jamaica Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen leaves, 21st March
item.description:
Please clear fallen leaves from the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lakeswood Road, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 21st March
item.description:
Big bag of garden waste outside Community hospice shop pickford lane
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Lane, Welling, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside no.2, 21st March
item.description:
2-3 parking bays directly outside no.2 have been blocked by wheelie bins and a pile of paving slabs for several weeks. If a parking suspension is needed, surely it should be applied for?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lyme Street, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped couch surrounded by rubbish, 21st March
item.description:
This couch has been here for a week, and this morning it's surrounded by dumped rubbish spread around it

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Reighton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waste blocking footpath, 21st March
item.description:
Mantrasses have been there since several weeks, blocking the footpath. More bin is constantly being added. This problem has been consistent and the residents keep on putting large items on the footpath. Rothsay street 22-30

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rothsay Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: You left you're yellow fence behind, 21st March
item.description:
You gave Kelly Harris at 8 elmstead crescent an extension and drop down drive due to her son being ill and no disrespect I think the concrete on the pavement where you did the job is set now so do you mind coming to collect it before I throw it through her window, every time I go to park she puts it on the road to stop people parking it's makes cars harder to get on and off the street and if anyone parks where that yellow fence is she is aggressive and narsty bullyinh and threating to kill myself and my family for example just for parking where the fence is it doesn't need to be there and if I keep getting these threats I will be taking you to court. She's asking everyone for money to pay for a holiday and making the excuse oh my son needs a surgery in new York and you lot at Bexley council allow her to talk to people on the street like there nothing all over parking and it needs dealing with.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmsted Crescent, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumping of 3 waste bags, 21st March
item.description:
Rubbish spilling out over road & pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 62, Claylands Road, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside the council grounds, by 1b Harvist Road, 21st March
item.description:
A chest with a lot of rubbish in

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harvist Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Huge pothole, 21st March
item.description:
Large pothole that makes 244 bus turning onto Cantwell road unsafe when people preparing to get off.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cantwell Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 1B Harvist road, 21st March
item.description:
Several bags of litter in the street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harvist Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Scrambler bikes ruining the grass & dangerous driving, 21st March
item.description:
Nearly everyday scrambler bikes are racing across the green,it’s very dangerous as people want to use the open space but cannot when the bikes are racing across the green,dog walkers,children etc. It’s incredibly noisy & disturbing the peace of local residents. The grass is also being ruined. It needs to stop,it’s an accident waiting to happen.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tillingbourne Green, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping, 21st March
item.description:
Always rubbish left here and graffiti

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Valley Road, Streatham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
